heroHeadline: Day 39: Iran Reports US-Israeli Projectile Strikes Tehran Synagogue — Civilian Religious Site Hit in Capital
heroSubtitle: Iran claims a US-Israeli projectile struck a synagogue inside Tehran, a notable escalation targeting a civilian religious site in the capital. Single-source claim; independent verification pending.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-07. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
